name: slint-gallery
description: Standalone Slint gallery for Primer components (Node + slint-ui entry).

scripts.dev:rust:mcp: cross-env SLINT_EMIT_DEBUG_INFO=1 SLINT_ENABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_FEATURES=1 SLINT_MCP_PORT=8080 cargo run --manifest-path ../rust/Cargo.toml --bin primer_slint_gallery_runner --features slint/mcp
